response.step_by_step_log: I watched the entire video. The content consists solely of a VTuber speaking and sounds related to food preparation. No vocal music is present.
response.global_summary: A video of a VTuber named Koyori talking while preparing food, specifically chopping onions and eggplants. There is no vocal music playing throughout the video.
